mapper.select:
SELECT /* PushMapper.getPushSendData */ A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO, A.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO, A.USERID, B.UDID, B.OS, B.SEND_YN, B.LAST_ACCESS_DT, A.APP_OS_TP, A.PROC_ST, A.SND_PROC_DT, A.SND_TITLE, A.SND_MSG, A.PUSH_IMG_URL, A.LINK_URL, A.SND_CNT, A.SND_TEST_YN FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_TRGT_LIST A, ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS FROM ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL ) WHERE RNK = '1' ) B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USERID = B.USER_ID
AND A.PROC_ST IS NULL
AND A.PROC_ST = #{procSt}
ORDER BY PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO DESC

SELECT A.PUSH_SEQ, A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO, A.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO, A.USERID, B.UDID, B.OS, B.SEND_YN, B.LAST_ACCESS_DT, A.APP_OS_TP, A.PROC_ST, A.SND_PROC_DT, A.SND_TITLE, A.SND_MSG, A.PUSH_IMG_URL, A.LINK_URL, A.SND_CNT, A.SND_TEST_YN, A.CURRENT_STAT FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT A, (SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS FROM ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL) WHERE RNK = '1') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USERID = B.USER_ID AND A.PROC_ST IS NULL AND A.CURRENT_STAT IS NULL AND PUSH_SEQ between #{minCnt} and #{maxCnt} ORDER BY PUSH_SEQ asc
mapper.update: UPDATE /* PushMapper.updatePushStanding */ NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT SET CURRENT_STAT = 'T', SYS_CHG_DTIME = SYSDATE WHERE 1=1 AND PUSH_SEQ BETWEEN #{minCnt} AND #{maxCnt} AND CURRENT_STAT IS NULL

UPDATE /* PushMapper.updateSendPushHist */ NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT SET PROC_ST = #{procSt}, SND_CNT = #{sndCnt}, CURRENT_STAT = #{currentStat}, SND_PROC_DT = SYSDATE, SYS_CHG_DTIME = SYSDATE WHERE 1=1 AND PUSH_SEQ = #{pushSeq} --seq
mapper.select: SELECT min(push_seq) as minCnt, min(push_seq) + #{unitCnt} as maxCnt FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT a, (SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS FROM ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL) WHERE RNK = '1') B WHERE a.USERID = b.USER_ID AND PROC_ST IS NULL AND CURRENT_STAT IS NULL

SELECT count(*) FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT A, (SELECT USER_ID FROM ( SELECT USER_ID, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL AND UDID IS NOT NULL) WHERE RNK = '1') B WHERE A.USERID = B.USER_ID AND A.CURRENT_STAT = 'M'

SELECT A.PUSH_SEQ, A.USERID, B.UDID, A.APP_OS_TP, A.SND_TITLE, A.SND_MSG, A.LINK_URL, A.CURRENT_STAT, A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT A, (SELECT UDID, USER_ID FROM ( SELECT UDID, USER_ID, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE USER_ID IS NOT NULL AND UDID IS NOT NULL) WHERE RNK = '1') B WHERE 1=1 AND A.USERID = B.USER_ID AND A.CURRENT_STAT = 'M' ORDER BY PUSH_SEQ
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT SET CURRENT_STAT = 'T', SYS_CHG_DTIME = SYSDATE WHERE 1=1 AND CURRENT_STAT = 'M'
mapper.select: SELECT PUSH_SND_ID ,PUSH_SND_DD ,PUSH_TITLE ,PUSH_MSG ,PUSH_LINK ,PREV_TEL_CODE ,PUSH_STAT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_ID ,CRET_DT ,AMD_DT ,RIP FROM MCP_PUSH_SND_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND PUSH_STAT = 'R' AND PUSH_SND_DD = #{pushSndDd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_PUSH_SND_INFO SET PUSH_STAT = 'W', AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE PUSH_SND_DD = #{pushSndDd} and PUSH_STAT = 'R'
UPDATE MCP_PUSH_SND_INFO SET PUSH_STAT = 'C', AMD_DT = SYSDATE, SUCCESS_COUNT = #{successCount}, FAIL_COUNT = #{failCount} WHERE PUSH_SND_DD = #{pushSndDd} and PUSH_STAT = 'W'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_PUSH_SND_TRGT_HIST ( PUSH_SEQ, PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO, PUSH_SND_SET_SNO, USERID, CELL_NO, APP_OS_TP, APP_ID, PROC_ST, APP_OS_VER, SND_PROC_DT, SERVER_COLCT_YN, APP_COLCT_YN, PUSH_ICON_TP, SND_TITLE, SND_MSG, PUSH_IMG_URL, PUSH_IMG_NM, LINK_DIV, LINK_URL, SND_CNT, SND_TEST_YN, TGT_SERVER, SYS_REG_IP, SYS_REG_DTIME, SYS_REG_ID, SYS_CHG_IP, SYS_CHG_DTIME, SYS_CHG_ID, CURRENT_STAT ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(PUSH_SEQ), 0) FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_TRGT_HIST) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.PUSH_SEQ) AS PUSH_SEQ, A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO, A.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO, A.USERID, A.CELL_NO, A.APP_OS_TP, A.APP_ID, A.PROC_ST, A.APP_OS_VER, A.SND_PROC_DT, A.SERVER_COLCT_YN, A.APP_COLCT_YN, A.PUSH_ICON_TP, A.SND_TITLE, A.SND_MSG, A.PUSH_IMG_URL, A.PUSH_IMG_NM, A.LINK_DIV, A.LINK_URL, A.SND_CNT, A.SND_TEST_YN, A.TGT_SERVER, A.SYS_REG_IP, A.SYS_REG_DTIME, A.SYS_REG_ID, A.SYS_CHG_IP, A.SYS_CHG_DTIME, A.SYS_CHG_ID, A.CURRENT_STAT FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_SCD_TRGT A WHERE A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO = #{pushSndProcSno}
